name: Robinhood Gold Card
developer_notes: Must have active Robinhood Gold subscription ($5/mo or $50/yr)

name: Robinhood Platinum Card

statement_credits.name: Dining Statement Credit
statement_credits.restrictions: Qualifying participating local restaurants only; up to $20 each month; credits do not roll over and refunded charges reverse credits

statement_credits.name: Dining December Bonus
statement_credits.restrictions: Extra $10 available in December for eligible dining purchases to reach up to $250 total annual dining credits

statement_credits.name: DoorDash Monthly Credits
statement_credits.restrictions: Requires DashPass activation; typically two $10 discounts per month on qualifying $50+ delivery orders; monthly discounts do not roll over

statement_credits.name: DoorDash January Bonus
statement_credits.restrictions: January receives one extra $10 DoorDash discount (up to three total $10 discounts) to reach up to $250 annual DoorDash value

statement_credits.name: Function Health Membership Credit
statement_credits.restrictions: Enrollment required in app; annual statement credit applies after eligible Function Health membership charge posts

statement_credits.name: Health Wearables Credit
statement_credits.restrictions: Up to $200 total statement credits per membership year on qualifying health wearable purchases

statement_credits.name: Oura Membership Credit
statement_credits.restrictions: Requires app opt-in and eligible Oura Ring purchase with prepaid annual membership within six months; limited-time offer terms apply

statement_credits.name: Travel Statement Credit
statement_credits.restrictions: Up to $300 total per membership year, generally disbursed as $150 every six months on qualifying travel purchases; credits do not roll over

statement_credits.name: Hotel Booking Credit (Robinhood Travel)
statement_credits.restrictions: Qualifying luxury hotels booked through Robinhood Travel only; minimum 2-night stay; each six-month period allows up to $250 total with up to $100 usable toward standard hotel bookings

statement_credits.name: Global Entry/TSA PreCheck
statement_credits.restrictions: One application fee reimbursement per 4-year cycle for an eligible trusted traveler program

statement_credits.name: Autonomous Ride Credit
statement_credits.restrictions: Eligible autonomous ride purchases only; up to $20 each month; credits do not roll over and refunded charges reverse credits

statement_credits.name: Autonomous Ride December Bonus
statement_credits.restrictions: Extra $10 available in December for eligible autonomous rides to reach up to $250 total annual autonomous ride credits

developer_notes: Benefits reflect Robinhood legal overview last updated 2026-03-04. Some benefits require enrollment or account linkage in app and may change at any time. Non-statement benefits include DashPass membership, Priority Pass Select, Amazon One Medical membership sponsorship, and Robinhood Gold membership.

name: Wells Fargo Signia Card
